title: Powers Of Destruction
description: Destroy buildings and cities in the blink of an eye with new explosives, weapons, and even nukes!
body:
In this mod many different types of destructive items and blocks are added to allow you to create instant chaos and destruction across your world! Items like throwable nukes, explosive swords, and no fuse TNT are just some things that are added in this mod.



Some of the main items this mod offers are generally explosion related. The main "explosive" item this mod provides is the throwable nuke, which is a nuke that can be thrown (and will destroy very large amounts of land if you are willing to use it). Along with the nuke, things like throwing knifes and Boom Blades (Explosive Swords) are also obtainable. The Boom Blade is a sword that explodes upon use and impact, and the throwing knife is just a throwable knife. Most of these items are generally just here to create chaos, destruction, and (unintendedly) lag as well as create some fun, destructive, things for you and/or your friends to get. With these Powers of Destruction, things small and large can be destroyed in a blink of an eye.
